topic: Building Production RAG Systems with Voyage AI and MongoDB Atlas
problem: Most RAG tutorials stop at 'hello world' — developers struggle to build production pipelines that handle real-world concerns like cost optimization, retrieval quality measurement, and scalable ingestion of millions of documents
solution: A progressive, hands-on walkthrough of building production RAG using the open-source voyageai-cli toolkit — from chunking strategies through two-stage retrieval, asymmetric embedding for 83% cost savings, and quality evaluation with MRR and nDCG@K metrics
audience: Backend and full-stack developers building AI-powered applications who want to move beyond toy RAG examples to production-grade retrieval systems
takeaways: Build a complete RAG pipeline from CLI: chunk, embed, store, search, rerank — in one command
Leverage Voyage AI's shared embedding space for asymmetric retrieval (83% query cost reduction)
Measure retrieval quality with MRR, nDCG@K, and Recall@K — not just vibes
Choose the right chunking strategy and embedding model for your domain (code, legal, finance)
Compose multi-step RAG workflows and expose them as MCP tools for AI agents
proof: Principal Staff Developer Advocate at MongoDB. Built voyageai-cli (vaicli.com) — an open-source RAG toolkit with 22+ commands, 312+ tests, workflow composition, and MCP server integration. Hands-on experience building and deploying RAG systems with MongoDB Atlas Vector Search.
